chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1587 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on CMA No.3250/2025 2.For hearing of CMA No.7282/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 None present for the Petitioners. Mr.Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, A.A.G. 1. Urgency granted. The petitioners appear to assert propriety rights in immovable property through this petition, as the same prima facie not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. The prayer also contains the aspect of harassment and the same cannot be entertained in view of the Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as PLD 2019 Sindh 168. In view hereof, this petition being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge NASIR
